description: Defines what the agent can do. Locked capabilities are core system functions. Unlocked capabilities can be modified, added, or extended by the agent itself.

capabilities.name: Observe
capabilities.description: Read source files from the project directory

capabilities.name: Analyze
capabilities.description: Send file content to LLM for architectural analysis

capabilities.name: Journal
capabilities.description: Record observations, analyses, and reflections to the session journal

capabilities.name: Modify UI
capabilities.description: Write HTML/CSS/JS into the agent zone of the dashboard

capabilities.name: Direct Query
capabilities.description: Accept and answer freeform questions via LLM

capabilities.name: Write Documentation
capabilities.description: Generate markdown docs about discovered patterns

capabilities.name: Auto-Discover Files
capabilities.description: Automatically find .py files when the exploration queue is empty

capabilities.name: Visualize Architecture
capabilities.description: Generate visual diagrams of system architecture in the agent zone

capabilities.name: Summarize Session
capabilities.description: Generate a high-level summary of everything learned in a session

capabilities.name: Suggest Refactors
capabilities.description: Propose code improvements based on architectural analysis

capabilities.name: Compare Files
capabilities.description: Analyze relationships and dependencies between explored files

capabilities.name: Custom Prompt Template
capabilities.description: User-defined prompt template for analysis steps
